Calculate the Rey AVLT Accuracy

Source: R/calc_REYAREC.R
calc_REYAREC.Rd

Calculates accuracy from true positives and false positives, but applies valid_values_only() first. As percentage, i.e. a value of 55 means 55%.

Usage

calc_REYAREC(reytcor, reyfpos)

Arguments

reytcor

true positives

reyfpos

false positives
